0,  # $1.83B

    "Total Cash": 9062359040  # $9.06B

# Material Cash Requirements 通常包括：
# 资本支出 + 债务偿还 + 利息支出 + 其他承诺支出

material_cash_requirements = (
    nflx_data["Capital Expenditure"] +  # CapEx
    nflx_data["Repayment Of Debt"] +     # 债务偿还
    nflx_data["Interest Paid"]           # 利息
)

print("=== Netflix 2025 Material Cash Requirements ===")
print(f"Capital Expenditure: ${nflx_data['Capital Expenditure']:,.0f}")
print(f"Debt Repayment: ${nflx_data['Repayment Of Debt']:,.0f}")
print(f"Interest Paid: ${nflx_data['Interest Paid']:,.0f}")
print(f"\nTotal Projected Material Cash Requirements: ${material_cash_requirements:,.0f}")
print(f"Total: ${material_cash_requirements/1e9:.2f} Billion")

# Also show free cash flow coverage
print(f"\nFree Cash Flow: ${nflx_data['Free Cash Flow']:,.0f}")
print(f"FCF Coverage: {nflx_data['Free Cash Flow']/material_cash_requirements:.2f}x")
